citation: centre-mersenne 2022 follow-on; Luo-Sellke 2017 J. Algebraic Combin.
false_form: The tensor cube variant of the Saxl conjecture remains open.
name: SAXL_CUBE_ANCHOR
true_form: The tensor CUBE variant (S_{ρ_n})^⊗3 was proven to contain all irreducible representations of S_N in 2022 (centre-mersenne follow-on to Luo-Sellke 2017). The Saxl conjecture proper (tensor SQUARE) remains open. Companion entry to AA-004; surfaces the precise gap that remains.
verification_source: Wave 1 Gemini Deep Research, prompt 01 — newly discovered sub-anchor
